_comment: Central tunable knobs for the 5-layer radar (recall / pre-rank / rank / watchpool / output). Edit values here for quick adjustments without touching code. Reverting is as simple as changing a number back.

form_taxonomy._comment: L2/L3 relevance gate. A candidate passes if it matches ANY of the four forms. Matched as whole-word tokens (or multi-word substrings) on the lowercased title/app name.

commercialization_terms._comment: L2/L3 commercialization filter. Includes monetization AND incentive/growth (per decision: incentives are also excluded). For the REGULAR competitor line, any hit => drop. For the EMERGING line => keep but annotate. Form gate still applies to emerging.

hard_exclude_terms._comment: L2 only-kill-obvious-garbage list. These are ALWAYS dropped on both lines (truly off-topic / non-product noise). Kept deliberately narrow so pre-rank does NOT do rank's job.

priority_weights._comment: L2 scoring (NOT kill switches). A candidate is always kept as review; these only set priority=high vs low so the agent triages high first.

ranking_noise._comment: L2 ranking de-noise (emerging line only). Developer/utility tools and mature incumbents are dropped from store-ranking candidates.

confidence_model._comment: L3 cross-verification (agent applies). Confidence A/B/C/D drives keep/drop per line.

definitions.A: Official source confirms the signal (official blog, exec post, in-product visible).
definitions.B: No direct official confirmation, but >=2 INDEPENDENT domains report it AND all trace back to the official source. Independence = dedup by domain, anti-transclusion, anti-same-source-rumor.
definitions.C: Single/unconfirmed source. Regular line: drop. Emerging line: admit into watchpool for early observation.
definitions.D: Same-source transcription / pure rumor / mutually-copied with no traceable origin. Always drop.

watchpool._comment: L4 watchpool (emerging line only). Cross-week tracking list.

media_capture._comment: L5 visual asset policy for regular-competitor new features. Reuse pages already visited in L3 first; only do a targeted re-search when none found; if no animated demo exists, use a static screenshot placeholder (no in-product recording unless user explicitly asks).

source_priority._comment: L5 citation pick when many sites report the same feature. Primary = official; secondary fills detail gaps. Never use aggregator/entertainment sites as primary.
